title: SessionConfig
description: Per-session routing overlay passed to the launcher with --config. Composes over a preset and under inline arguments. Maps onto existing profile overlay keys plus a policy and compression toggle. Contains no credentials.

preset.description: Base preset (named profile) to layer this file over, e.g. claude, codex, hermes, pi, ante, opencode.

policy.description: Selection policy. budget carries a numeric ceiling, e.g. budget:0.50.

compress.description: Whether to route through the compression stage for this session.

provider_override.description: Provider registry name to force for the main model, e.g. anthropic.

roles.description: Per-tier and per-use-case overrides. Keys are tiers (big/middle/small) or use cases (toolcall/web_search/image/background) or named roles.

roleOverride.description: Exactly one selection mode should be set: passthrough, an explicit model, or a snapshot slot.

passthrough.description: Leave the caller's model intact for this role (suppresses force_main and overrides).

model.description: Explicit router-ready provider/model id for this role.

provider.description: Provider registry name accompanying an explicit model.

slot.description: Bind this role from the snapshot via the named role/slot, e.g. R8_web_extract.
